item.title: Cook's Battle at the Fed
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Cook’s Battle at the Fed

There once was a Fed board named Cook,
Whom Trump, with no cause, overtook.
But she wouldn’t resign,
Said, “This job is mine!”
As the headlines, her story, forsook.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Says He Is Firing Lisa Cook From Fed Board of Governors
  • Lisa Cook Says She Will Not Step Down From the Fed Board
  • Lisa Cook Broke Ground at the Fed, Before Attack by Trump

item.title: Trump's Economic Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Economic Tango

Trump’s grasp on the Fed’s like a game,
Jerome’s speech at Jackson won’t tame.
With jobs on the line,
And power in decline,
The economy’s caught in the flame.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Taking on the Fed, Trump Combines Retribution Tactics With a Power Play
  • Trump’s Attacks on the Fed and BLS Threaten Key Source of Economic Strength
  • Jay Powell Takes Center Stage with Friday’s Jackson Hole Address
  • Year Will End With 300,000 Fewer Federal Workers, Trump Official Says

item.title: Economy and Strategies on the Rise
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economy and Strategies on the Rise

At Jackson Hole, Powell did preach,
But Nvidia’s rise was the speech.
While tariffs caused fret,
Walmart’s sales were a bet,
And Trump’s plans for maps overreach.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Behind Powell’s Big Gamble in Final Jackson Hole Speech
  • Investors Expect Nvidia’s Earnings to Move the S&P More Than Powell’s Speech
  • Walmart Sees Sales ‘Momentum’ Despite Tariffs
  • Texas House Approves Redistricting Maps, Just as Trump Wanted

item.title: Economic Quakes and Political Shakes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economic Quakes and Political Shakes

The tariffs caused data to waver,
Leaving Lula and Trump in a quaver.
The Fed held its rates,
While the judge sealed his fate,
And farm subsidies sparked some disfavor.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Economy Grew in Second Quarter as Tariffs Scrambled Data
  • Brazil’s President Lula Voices Frustration With Trump Amid Tariff Battle
  • What to Watch at the Federal Reserve’s July Meeting
  • Trump’s Tax Bill Expands Farm Subsidies. Not All Farmers Will Benefit.
  • Tsunami Reaches U.S., and Trump’s Former Lawyer Confirmed as Judge

item.title: Trump's Turbulent Tides
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Turbulent Tides

In the States, Trump’s tariffs take flight,
While the Fed’s in a critical plight.
Crypto’s the rage,
Truth Social’s new page,
And Texas floods deepen the night.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Takes Reins on U.S. Economy With Policy Bill and Tariffs Renewal
  • Bessent Steps Up Criticism of Fed as Auditions for Chair Intensify
  • How Crypto Lobbying Won Over Trump
  • At Least 173 People Are Still Missing After Texas Floods

item.title: Economic and Legal Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economic and Legal Tango

Jerome and Trump have a spat,
‘Tis rates and the Fed they combat.
With lawsuits galore,
And media uproar,
Their clash keeps the headlines quite fat.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Jerome Powell and the Fed Head for Another Collision with Trump
  • Trump and His Picks Threaten More Lawsuits Over Critical Coverage

item.title: The Rate Debate
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Rate Debate

In Washington, bonds start to climb,
Though the Fed cuts rates all the time.
Trump’s plans make them wary,
As Powell’s stance stays contrary,
Mortgage rates hit a new paradigm.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Why Bond Yields Are Rising After Trump’s Victory
  • If the Fed Is Cutting Rates, Why Are Mortgage Rates Rising?
  • What Trump’s Win Means for the Federal Reserve and Jerome Powell
